title: Fix gate auto worktree

tasks.title: Wire target-aware gate mutation workdir and auto-manage deps
tasks.implementation_summary: Added target-aware cwd selection in target-project.ts and wired adv_gate_complete to use the active target store root for worktree isolation. Preserved production auto-managed resume deps via buildWorktreeAutoManageDeps(activeStore). Added gate/worktree-auto-manage regression coverage for target_path gate completion, main-checkout auto-managed violation with expectedWorktreePath, proposal exemption, and defensive missing-runtime behavior.
tasks.verification: Completed. Evidence: targeted regression test command passed; pnpm run check, pnpm run build, and full pnpm test passed. Checkpoint clean at 77d05a8fd2c90d34a8a8d8963e3fa28877554aae.
tasks.summary: Added target-aware cwd selection in target-project.ts and wired adv_gate_complete to use the active target store root for worktree isolation. Preserved production auto-managed resume deps via buildWorktreeAutoManageDeps(activeStore). Added gate/worktree-auto-manage regression coverage for target_path gate completion, main-checkout auto-managed violation with expectedWorktreePath, proposal exemption, and defensive missing-runtime behavior.

tasks.title: Wire target-aware task mutation workdir
tasks.implementation_summary: Wired guarded task mutations to resolve mutation cwd through the active target store when target_path is present, preventing task_add/task_update isolation checks from using the host process cwd. Added task regression coverage for target_path task creation using target root git-session detection.
tasks.verification: Completed. Evidence: targeted regression test command passed; pnpm run check, pnpm run build, and full pnpm test passed. Checkpoint clean at 77d05a8fd2c90d34a8a8d8963e3fa28877554aae.
tasks.summary: Wired guarded task mutations to resolve mutation cwd through the active target store when target_path is present, preventing task_add/task_update isolation checks from using the host process cwd. Added task regression coverage for target_path task creation using target root git-session detection.

tasks.title: Remove legacy worktree aliases and align specs/instructions
tasks.implementation_summary: Removed legacy worktree_create/worktree_delete/worktree_cleanup alias registration and degraded title entries. Updated rq-warpModeContract06 to require non-registration of legacy aliases. Updated ADV agent allowlists, command docs, worktree skill, and asset/registry tests to use canonical adv_worktree_* names only.
tasks.verification: Completed. Evidence: targeted registry/asset tests passed; pnpm run check, pnpm run build, and full pnpm test passed. Checkpoint clean at 77d05a8fd2c90d34a8a8d8963e3fa28877554aae.
tasks.summary: Removed legacy worktree_create/worktree_delete/worktree_cleanup alias registration and degraded title entries. Updated rq-warpModeContract06 to require non-registration of legacy aliases. Updated ADV agent allowlists, command docs, worktree skill, and asset/registry tests to use canonical adv_worktree_* names only.

tasks.title: Stabilize blocking full-suite worktree cleanup test and verify release bar
tasks.implementation_summary: Stabilized pending-delete full-suite test state by using fixture-specific synthetic project IDs instead of a shared constant. Verified the complete branch with targeted tests, static checks, build, and full test suite. Confirmed build output leaves git status clean.
tasks.verification: Completed. Evidence: targeted regression command passed; pnpm run check passed; pnpm run build passed; full pnpm test passed; git status clean. Runtime caveat retained: OpenCode sessions must restart after build/deploy to load changed plugin host tool code.
tasks.summary: Stabilized pending-delete full-suite test state by using fixture-specific synthetic project IDs instead of a shared constant. Verified the complete branch with targeted tests, static checks, build, and full test suite. Confirmed build output leaves git status clean.

wisdom.content: `adv_change_update` writes provided empty strings as artifact contents; omit fields entirely to leave artifacts unchanged. Passing `proposal:""`/`agreement:""` can temporarily trip artifact readiness until restored.
Full-suite worktree cleanup tests are safer when fixture project IDs derive from per-test temp paths; shared constants can leak external pending-delete state across runs.

proposal.approval_evidence: User explicitly requested immediate fix: "this is a bigger deal -- fix this and fully wire this up now". Proposal includes scope and success criteria for urgent production wiring bug.

discovery.approval_evidence: Discovery workflow completed from restored artifacts: agreement restored and adv_change_validate strict passed with only expected pre-prep warnings.

design.approval_evidence: Design artifact persisted and independently validated by adv-researcher with verdict VALIDATED. No user-value tradeoff, unresolved CONFLICT, or contract-compromise risk detected.

planning.approval_evidence: Prep synthesized four-task graph from validated design. Tasks cover gate target cwd/deps, task target cwd, alias/spec/instruction cleanup, and verification/full-suite stabilization. User requested `complete fixGateAutoWorktree`, and agreement artifact records prior approval of AC/verification scope.

execution.approval_evidence: All four planned tasks completed with clean checkpoints. Verification passed: targeted regression tests, pnpm run check, pnpm run build, full pnpm test, and git status clean.

artifact_evidence.compatibility_reason: Legacy poisoned workflow. Original work shipped on trunk; all 4 tasks completed. Contract reconstructed at minimal rigor (task tools lack poisoned-history recovery per ag-sDKvJJsL).

items.text: `adv_gate_complete` production path wires auto-managed worktree resume runtime deps for non-proposal gates.
Main-checkout completion for an auto-managed change attempts resume/materialization and returns `WorktreeIsolationViolation` with `expectedWorktreePath`, not `resumeRuntime missing`.
`target_path` gate completion uses the target store root as mutation cwd and sends the gate signal through the target store.
`adv_task_add` / guarded task mutations use the target store root as mutation cwd when `target_path` is provided.
Proposal gate remains exempt.
Gate completion from an ADV worktree remains allowed.
Production-path regression test covers `adv_gate_complete.execute`, not only helper-level seams.

Legacy aliases `worktree_create`, `worktree_delete`, and `worktree_cleanup` are not registered by `createToolMap`, are not present in `ADV_TOOL_NAMES`, and are removed from ADV orchestrator allowlists/instructions.
Verification requires targeted regression tests, `pnpm run check`, `pnpm run build`, and full `pnpm test`.
Any test failures found during required verification are fixed in this change.
Live OpenCode tool validation in the current session is not required before acceptance; release notes must state rebuild/deploy/restart caveat.
Preserve `rq-worktreeMutationGuard01` and `worktree-lifecycle` spec semantics.
Do not allow non-proposal gate mutations to proceed from the main checkout.
Do not bypass the main-checkout guard with symlinks, env hacks, deployed-artifact hand edits, or manual file shuffling.
Keep implementation scoped to gate/task auto-worktree production wiring, legacy alias removal, and directly blocking verification failures.
Source verification runs from `plugin/`.
Do not change worktree lifecycle policy.
Do not remove the defensive `resumeRuntime missing` diagnostic branch; it remains useful for callers that fail to wire deps.
Do not keep duplicate visible worktree tool names for compatibility.
Do not absorb unrelated roadmap items unless they block the agreed required verification.

rows.evidence: Production adv_gate_complete wires auto-managed worktree resume deps via buildWorktreeAutoManageDeps in plugin/src/tools/gate.ts; verified by 4 completed tasks.
Main checkout auto-managed violation returns WorktreeIsolationViolation with expectedWorktreePath; covered by gate.test.ts regression.
target_path gate completion uses target store root via resolveTargetAwareMutationCwd; gate.test.ts asserts.
task.ts uses resolveTargetAwareMutationCwd; task.test.ts asserts.
proposal gate exempted via evaluateGateWorktreeIsolation early-return.
gate completion from worktree allowed by isolation guard's session-context detection.
Production-path regression covers adv_gate_complete.execute via gate.test.ts.
Legacy aliases removed from createToolMap, ADV_TOOL_NAMES, allowlists; tool-registry.test.ts asserts.
Verification recorded: targeted regression, pnpm run check, pnpm run build, full pnpm test all green at change completion.
Worktree pending-delete fixture leak fixed as part of full-suite verification.
Executive summary records rebuild/deploy/restart caveat.
rq-worktreeMutationGuard01 + worktree-lifecycle spec semantics preserved.
Main checkout non-proposal mutations remain blocked via WorktreeIsolationViolation.
No symlink/env/deployed-artifact hacks; TS source + tests only.
Scope stayed within gate/task wiring + alias cleanup.
Verification ran from plugin/.
No worktree lifecycle policy change.
Defensive resumeRuntime-missing diagnostic preserved.
Duplicate worktree aliases removed; no compatibility aliases retained.
Scope unchanged beyond blocking full-suite stabilization.

acceptanceCriteria: `adv_gate_complete` production path wires auto-managed worktree resume runtime deps for non-proposal gates.
Main-checkout completion for an auto-managed change attempts resume/materialization and returns `WorktreeIsolationViolation` with `expectedWorktreePath`, not `resumeRuntime missing`.
`target_path` gate completion uses the target store root as mutation cwd and sends the gate signal through the target store.
`adv_task_add` / guarded task mutations use the target store root as mutation cwd when `target_path` is provided.
Gate completion from an ADV worktree remains allowed.
Production-path regression test covers `adv_gate_complete.execute`, not only helper-level seams.

Legacy aliases `worktree_create`, `worktree_delete`, and `worktree_cleanup` are not registered by `createToolMap`, are not present in `ADV_TOOL_NAMES`, and are removed from ADV orchestrator allowlists/instructions.
Verification requires targeted regression tests, `pnpm run check`, `pnpm run build`, and full `pnpm test`.
Any test failures found during required verification are fixed in this change.
Live OpenCode tool validation in the current session is not required before acceptance; release notes must state rebuild/deploy/restart caveat.

clarify_findings.message: Proposal describes behavior that could fail but doesn't mention error handling or rollback. What happens when things go wrong?
Scope section is empty or placeholder. What specific files/modules will change?
